name: Cheesy Potato Skins
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes thoroughly and rub skins with oil.
2. Bake at 400°F for 1 hour or until done. Allow potatoes to cool to touch.
3. Cut in half lengthwise; carefully scoop out pulp, leaving a 1/4- to 1/8-inch shell. (Pulp may be used for mashed potatoes or reserved for another recipe.)
4. Cut shells in half crosswise and deep fry in hot oil (375°F) for 1 minute or until lightly browned. Drain on paper towels.
5. Place skins on a baking sheet; sprinkle with salt, cheese, and bacon.
6. Place under broiler until cheese melts.
7. Serve with sour cream.
